moran.name: Moran

findings: 0.713 COLD top cause F1: burst weapon-swap uses a DIFFERENT weapon spec (shot_id 1028102, rate_of_fire 1440=24 pulls/s = 2x base) the sim never loads -> she fires base 12/s during swap window, ~covers the whole 29% gap (moran/jill AR-burst-window cluster). Checkable from moran control.mov. NOTE moran is a TREASURE unit (helm SSOT-gap family)

moran.evidence: Run B video — firepower/CDR economy verified frame-by-frame; 0.91-0.93

skill1: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self. DEF ▲ 3.51% continuously for every 1% of HP lost.
skill2: Activates when firing the final bullet. Affects the 3 enemy unit(s) with the highest final ATK. Taunts for 4 sec.
Activates when HP falls below 20%. Affects self. Effects vary according to the number of uses. Perseverance: Only one effect is triggered at a time.
Once: Max HP ▲ 91% for 3 sec. Activates once per battle.
Twice: Max HP ▲ 69.84% for 3 sec. Activates once per battle.
Three Times: Max HP ▲ 51.09% for 3 sec. Activates once per battle.
burst: Recovers 36.14% of attack damage as HP over 10 sec.
Attract: Taunts all enemies for 10 sec.
Note: Unable to take cover while using Burst Skill.
DEF ▲ 14.85% of the skill user's DEF for 10 sec.
